title: No Title
summary: The Ford Foundation's grantmaking focuses on challenging inequality, supporting individuals and institutions working to address systemic challenges.

llm_eligibility.description: Ford Foundation works in this area to support efforts that promote democratic governance, civic engagement, and human rights.
Ford Foundation supports organizations working to protect and advance creativity, free expression, and the arts.
Ford Foundation invests in efforts that promote disability rights, inclusion, and accessibility.
Ford Foundation works to address the future of work, including issues related to labor, economic development, and human rights.
Ford Foundation supports efforts that promote gender, racial, and ethnic justice, equity, and inclusion.
Ford Foundation works to strengthen global governance systems, including international law, diplomacy, and human rights.
Ford Foundation makes mission investments in organizations that align with its goals of challenging inequality and advancing social justice.
Ford Foundation invests in efforts to promote sustainable natural resource management, climate justice, and environmental protection.
Ford Foundation works to ensure that technology is used to advance social justice, equity, and human rights.
